seoTitle: Horsley Park vs Hovells Creek — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Horsley Park and Hovells Creek. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Horsley Park vs Hovells Creek: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Horsley Park and Hovells Creek.
heading: Horsley Park vs Hovells Creek — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Horsley Park, New South Wales and Hovells Creek, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Hovells Creek has a lower overall climate risk score (34/100) compared to Horsley Park (44/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Horsley Park or Hovells Creek safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Horsley Park has a flood risk score of 54/100, while Hovells Creek scores 34/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Horsley Park scores 31/100 for bushfire risk. Hovells Creek scores 57/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Horsley Park or Hovells Creek?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Hovells Creek has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.03% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
